dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.enterRestaurantName: Enter your restaurant's name to get started.
dashboard.manageMenu: Manage your digital menu and QR code.
dashboard.customersCanScan: Customers can scan this to view your menu instantly.
dashboard.noViewsYet: No views yet. Share your link!
dashboard.updateCategories: Update your categories and items. Changes are saved automatically.
dashboard.restaurantCreatedDescription: Your dashboard is ready. You can start adding menu items now.

editMenu.title: Edit Menu
editMenu.subtitle: Organize your categories and items.
editMenu.noItemsInCategory: No items in this category yet.
editMenu.importSellTitle: Already have a printed or existing menu?
editMenu.importSellSubtitle: Import a photo or PDF, review the draft, and add the items without rebuilding everything by hand.
editMenu.importSellSubtitleLocked: AI import is part of the Professional plan. Upgrade to turn existing photos and PDFs into reviewed menu drafts.
editMenu.importUpgradeError: We could not start checkout right now.
editMenu.importTitle: Import menu from photo or PDF
editMenu.importSubtitle: Upload a current menu and we will draft categories and items for review before anything is added.
editMenu.importChooseFile: Choose a menu photo or PDF
editMenu.importFileHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, and PDF. Clear scans work best.
editMenu.importStepOne: Extract categories, items, descriptions, and prices
editMenu.importStepTwo: Keep uncertainty in warnings instead of guessing silently
editMenu.importStepThree: Let you review and edit the draft before import
editMenu.importNoItemsDetected: We could not confidently detect any menu items. Try a clearer photo or a cleaner PDF.
editMenu.importUnexpectedError: The import failed. Please try again.
editMenu.imageUploadErrorDescription: Please try another image or check that the menu-images storage bucket exists.
editMenu.categoryAddedDescription: Your category is ready for items.
editMenu.revertingChanges: We reverted the order so your menu stays consistent.
editMenu.importSuccessDescription: Your reviewed items were added to the menu.
editMenu.deleteCategoryDescription: This will also delete every item in this category.
editMenu.deleteItemDescription: This item will be removed from your menu.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your brand and localization.
settings.logoDescription: This logo will appear at the top of your public menu.
settings.brandColorDescription: Choose a primary color for your menu to match your brand.
settings.currencyDescription: This symbol will be displayed next to prices on your public menu.
settings.menuThemeDescription: Choose the template used on your public menu. Preview it before saving if you want to compare layouts.
settings.logoUploadErrorDescription: Your settings were not saved. Please try another image or check your storage setup.
settings.saveSuccessDescription: Your public menu settings are up to date.
settings.billingSubtitleFree: Upgrade when you want to unlock AI menu import. Everything else in the menu builder stays free.
settings.billingSubtitlePro: Your restaurant can use AI menu import and manage its subscription from here.
settings.billingSuccess: Your checkout finished. If your plan does not update immediately, refresh in a few seconds.
settings.billingCanceled: Checkout was canceled. Your current plan has not changed.
settings.aiImportFeatureEnabled: Included in your current plan. Upload a photo or PDF and review the import before publishing.
settings.aiImportFeatureLocked: Locked on the Free plan. Upgrade to Professional to import photos and PDFs with AI.
settings.billingSyncSuccessDescription: Your plan status has been refreshed.
settings.billingSyncError: We could not sync your billing status right now.
settings.billingPortalError: We could not open the billing portal right now.
settings.billingCheckoutError: We could not start checkout right now.

login.accountCreatedDescription: Check your email for the login link. If email confirmation is disabled, you can log in now.
login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your menu
login.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In

common.tryAgain: Please try again. If it keeps failing, contact support.

hero.subtitle: Create, manage, and share your restaurant's digital menu in seconds. No typing required—just upload a photo and let AI build your menu. Beautiful on any device, easy to update, and simple to translate.

qr.title: Your QR Code
qr.description: Customers can scan this to view your menu instantly.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to run a modern restaurant menu
featuresSection.subtitle: Built with cutting-edge tech to ensure speed, reliability, and an incredible user experience for both you and your guests.

mobile.title: Mobile-First Menus
mobile.description: Fast, beautiful, and intuitive menus optimized for the screens your customers already have in their hands.

qr.title: Instant QR Generation
qr.description: Download high-res PNGs for your tables or use our print-optimized layouts to get started instantly.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: Track daily menu views, popular categories, and peak scanning times directly from your dashboard.

translations.title: Smart Translations
translations.description: Automatically detect browser language and serve your menu seamlessly in English, Portuguese, and more.

editor.title: Drag & Drop Editor
editor.description: Reorder categories and items instantly with a fluid drag-and-drop interface. Changes are live immediately.

print.title: Print Optimized
print.description: Need a physical copy? Access a dedicated print view that removes web UI and saves your ink.

highlight.description: Transitioning to digital has never been faster. Our built-in AI import uses advanced vision models to read your physical menu or PDF and instantly convert it into a structured, editable digital draft.
bullets: Recognizes categories, items, descriptions, and prices.
Safe review workflow: edit before you publish.
Intelligently merges with existing menu structures.

modal.title: Import menu from photo or PDF
modal.subtitle: Upload your current menu and we will draft categories and items for review before anything is added.
modal.dropTitle: Choose a menu photo or PDF
modal.dropHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP and PDF. Clear photos and clean PDFs work best.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you need advanced insights and AI power.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Everything you need to digitize your menu.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For restaurants that want insights and speed.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your dining experience?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants using MenuQR to serve customers faster, update menus instantly, and understand diner behavior.
